caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black sweatshirt with "BOSS" written in gold lettering sits in a recording studio. He is gesturing with his right hand and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. On his left wrist, he wears a gold watch, and a gold chain is visible around his neck. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. To the right, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with red and white text that says "THE TALK OUT LOUD" sits on the table in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions and hand movements as he continues to speak and gesture while looking toward someone off-screen.
